steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The decisive clue is Mrs. Higgins’ direct command to Henry: “you mustn’t stay.” This is not a subtle implication but a clear instruction, indicating the central purpose of the exchange.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Choice B directly aligns with the command to leave, which is the explicit focus of Mrs. Higgins’ dialogue. The other choices either describe unrelated details (C), invert cause and effect (D), or misinterpret the conversation’s direction (A). That matches choice B — B is correct.
